description: Towering, thick-skinned brutes with jutting tusks and a talent for war.
subraces: Highland raiders charging downhill in howling war bands, prizing skull trophies.
Steppe-roaming nomads guided by shamanic visions and ancestor spirits.
Underdark tunnel-fighters breeding war beasts and waging endless subterranean campaigns.
Disciplined spacefaring soldiers having abandoned tribal chaos for military hierarchy.
Mixed-blood outcasts walking between two worlds, tempered by both human wit and orcish fury.
Elite underdark warriors bred for intelligence and tactics -- far deadlier than common orcs.
Mind flayer-engineered shock troops with psionic resistance and unflinching obedience.
Demon-blooded berserkers with fiendish horns and flames licking their scarred skin.
Dragonmarked trackers with a supernatural nose for bounty hunting and pathfinding.
